learningObjectives: Name common toys and weather words at Starters level.
Use It's + adjective to describe weather: It's sunny.
Form plurals with -s: two kites, three balloons.
Use these and those to point to nearby and distant things.
Describe pictures with toy and weather vocabulary in reading and speaking.
unit.readingSkillFocus: Describe Pictures with Weather and Toys

vocabularyBank.exampleSentence: I fly my kite in the park.
It is rainy. Take an umbrella.
There is a big cloud in the sky.
It is windy. Fly your kite!

grammarReference.explanation: Use It's (It is) plus a weather adjective to describe the weather.
Add -s to most nouns after numbers greater than one: two kites, three balloons.
Use these for things near you (plural). Use those for things far from you (plural).
examples: Those are kites in the sky.
commonMistakes: These is my toys (×) → These are my toys. (✓)
Those are a kite (×) → Those are kites. (✓)

lessons.title: Lesson 1: Toys and Weather
lessons.learningObjective: Recognise and understand twelve toy and weather words at Starters level.

exercises.title: Learn: Toy and Weather Match
exercises.instructions: Read each sentence. Choose the best word.

questions.questionText: You fly this in the sky on a windy day.
questions.explanation: A kite is flown in the sky, especially when it is windy. A balloon floats but is not flown like a kite.

choices.distractorNote: A toy you hold, not fly

questions.questionText: The sun is shining. It is _____.
questions.explanation: When the sun shines, the weather is sunny. Rainy means water falls from clouds.

questions.questionText: Water falls from the sky. It is _____.
questions.explanation: Rainy weather means rain falls from the sky. Sunny means bright sun.

questions.questionText: A soft toy bear that children hug is a _____.
questions.explanation: A teddy (teddy bear) is a soft toy. A robot is hard and mechanical; a doll looks like a person.

choices.distractorNote: Filled with air; not soft to hug

exercises.title: Practice: Match the Pairs
exercises.instructions: Match each word on the left with the correct meaning on the right.

questions.questionText: Match the toy and weather words to their meanings.
questions.explanation: Each word matches one clear meaning. Sunny and rainy describe opposite weather.

pairs.right: a toy that looks like a person
a toy that moves like a machine
a light toy filled with air
white or grey in the sky

exercises.title: Check: Toys and Weather Quiz
exercises.instructions: No hints — choose the best answer.

questions.questionText: You fly this on a windy day.
questions.explanation: Kite (diều) bay trên trời khi có gió.

questions.questionText: The sky is grey and water falls. It is _____.
questions.explanation: Rainy — trời mưa, bầu trời xám.

choices.distractorNote: Đồ chơi, không phải thời tiết

questions.questionText: Complete with toy or weather words.
questions.explanation: teddy = gấu bông; sunny = nắng.

content.template: I play with my [0]. Today is [1].

exercises.title: Review: Toys and Weather Quiz
exercises.instructions: No hints — choose the best answer.

questions.questionText: You fly this on a windy day.
questions.explanation: Kite (diều) bay trên trời khi có gió.

questions.questionText: The sky is grey and water falls. It is _____.
questions.explanation: Rainy — trời mưa, bầu trời xám.

choices.distractorNote: Đồ chơi, không phải thời tiết

lessons.title: Lesson 2: Toy Names
lessons.learningObjective: Name common toys: doll, teddy, robot, puzzle, balloon and kite.

questions.questionText: A soft bear you hug is a _____.
questions.explanation: Teddy (gấu bông) — đồ chơi mềm.

questions.questionText: You do this on a table — a _____.
questions.explanation: Puzzle — xếp hình trên bàn.

questions.questionText: A red _____ floats in the air.
questions.explanation: Balloon (bóng bay) bay lên.

questions.questionText: Match each toy to its description.
questions.explanation: Ghép tên đồ chơi với mô tả.

pairs.right: a toy that looks like a machine

questions.questionText: Which toy can fly in the sky?
questions.explanation: Kite bay trên trời.

questions.questionText: Lin buys a small _____ at the shop.
questions.explanation: They buy a small puzzle too.
Điền tên đồ chơi phù hợp.

content.template: I have a [0] and a red [1].

questions.questionText: Which toy can fly in the sky?
questions.explanation: Kite bay trên trời.

questions.questionText: Lin buys a small _____ at the shop.
questions.explanation: They buy a small puzzle too.

lessons.title: Lesson 3: Weather Words
lessons.learningObjective: Use sunny, rainy, windy, cloud and wind in simple sentences.

questions.questionText: The sun is out. It is _____.
questions.explanation: Sunny — trời nắng.

questions.questionText: Water falls from the sky. It is _____.
questions.explanation: Rainy — trời mưa.

questions.questionText: The _____ is strong — good for kites!
questions.explanation: Wind (gió) mạnh giúp diều bay.
Ghép từ thời tiết với nghĩa.

pairs.right: white or grey in the sky

questions.questionText: These _____ are white in the sky.
questions.explanation: Clouds (mây) trên trời.

questions.questionText: It is _____ — we can play outside!
questions.explanation: Sunny — ra ngoài chơi.

questions.questionText: Make a sentence about weather.
questions.explanation: It is + tính từ thời tiết.

questions.questionText: These _____ are white in the sky.
questions.explanation: Clouds (mây) trên trời.

questions.questionText: It is _____ — we can play outside!
questions.explanation: Sunny — ra ngoài chơi.

lessons.title: Lesson 2: Weather and Plurals
lessons.learningObjective: Use It's + weather adjective, plurals with -s, and these/those correctly.

exercises.title: Learn: Choose the Correct Words
exercises.instructions: Choose the correct word or phrase to complete each sentence.

questions.questionText: Look at the sun! _____ sunny.
questions.explanation: Use It's (It is) before a weather adjective.

questions.questionText: I have three _____.
questions.explanation: Three is plural, so add -s: three kites.

questions.questionText: _____ are my toys. (The toys are in your hands.)
questions.explanation: Use these for plural things near you.

questions.questionText: _____ are balloons in the sky. (The balloons are far away.)
questions.explanation: Use those for plural things far from you.

exercises.title: Practice: Weather and Toys
exercises.instructions: Complete the sentences with the correct words.

questions.questionText: Complete: [0] rainy today. | I have two [1]. | [2] are my dolls.
questions.explanation: It's + rainy; two robots (plural -s); These for near plural dolls.

content.template: [0] rainy today. I have two [1]. [2] are my dolls.

questions.questionText: Look outside! _____ windy today.
questions.explanation: It's = It is — mô tả thời tiết.

choices.distractorNote: These chỉ đồ vật số nhiều

questions.questionText: I have two _____.
questions.explanation: Sau two cần danh từ số nhiều: kites.
It's + tính từ thời tiết; these + danh từ số nhiều.

questions.questionText: Look outside! _____ windy today.
questions.explanation: It's = It is — mô tả thời tiết.

choices.distractorNote: These chỉ đồ vật số nhiều

questions.questionText: I have two _____.
questions.explanation: Sau two cần danh từ số nhiều: kites.

lessons.title: Lesson 2: It's + Weather
lessons.learningObjective: Use It's (It is) plus weather adjectives correctly.

questions.questionText: _____ sunny today!
questions.explanation: It's = It is — mô tả thời tiết.

questions.questionText: _____ rainy. Stay inside.
questions.explanation: It's + rainy — câu đúng.
It's + sunny/rainy/windy.

questions.questionText: Which sentence is correct?
questions.explanation: It's + windy — chuẩn.

questions.questionText: The sky is grey. _____ rainy.
questions.explanation: It's rainy — mô tả thời tiết.
It's + tính từ thời tiết.

questions.questionText: Which sentence is correct?
questions.explanation: It's + windy — chuẩn.

questions.questionText: The sky is grey. _____ rainy.
questions.explanation: It's rainy — mô tả thời tiết.

lessons.title: Lesson 3: Plurals and These/Those
lessons.learningObjective: Form plurals with -s and use these/those for nearby and distant things.

questions.questionText: Two _____ — not one!
questions.explanation: Sau two: kites (số nhiều).

questions.questionText: _____ are my toys. (near me)
questions.explanation: These = gần, số nhiều.
Thêm -s sau số lớn hơn một.

content.template: I have two [0]. Three [1] are red.

questions.questionText: Kites in the sky, far away. _____ are kites.
questions.explanation: Those = xa, số nhiều.

questions.questionText: Three _____ on the shelf.
questions.explanation: Three robots — thêm -s.

questions.questionText: _____ are my balloons. (in my hand)
questions.explanation: These — gần tay.

questions.questionText: Kites in the sky, far away. _____ are kites.
questions.explanation: Those = xa, số nhiều.

questions.questionText: Three _____ on the shelf.
questions.explanation: Three robots — thêm -s.

lessons.title: Lesson 3: Toys in the Park
lessons.learningObjective: Read a short text about toys and weather and describe what you see in pictures.

exercises.title: Learn: Read: A Windy Day
exercises.instructions: Read the text. Then answer the questions.

passage.title: A Windy Day in the Park
passage.text:
Today is windy but sunny. Tom and Sue go to the park.

These are Tom's toys: a robot and a teddy. Those are Sue's toys: two dolls and a puzzle.

Tom flies his kite. The kite is in the sky! Sue has red balloons. One balloon goes up, up, up!

There is a big cloud. It is not rainy. The children are happy.

questions.questionText: What is the main idea of the text?
questions.explanation: The text describes children playing with toys in the park on a windy, sunny day.

choices.text: Children play with toys in the park.

questions.questionText: What toy does Tom fly?
questions.explanation: The text says: Tom flies his kite.

questions.questionText: Why is it a good day to fly a kite?
questions.explanation: The text says it is windy; wind helps kites fly in the sky.

choices.distractorNote: Text says it is not rainy

questions.questionText: In 'Those are Sue's toys', what does those refer to?
questions.explanation: Those refers to Sue's toys: two dolls and a puzzle.

questions.questionText: Put the ideas in order: (1) Tom and Sue go to the park (2) Tom flies his kite (3) The weather is described (4) Sue has balloons
questions.explanation: The text opens with weather, then the park, then toys and activities.

choices.distractorNote: Weather comes before the park trip

passage.title: A Rainy Day
passage.text:
Today the sky is grey. It is rainy and windy. We stay inside.

I play with my teddy and my doll. My brother flies his kite when it is sunny.

Look at those clouds! But now we do a puzzle. It is fun.

Tomorrow will be sunny. We can play outside!

questions.questionText: What toys does the writer play with?
questions.explanation: I play with my teddy and my doll.

questions.questionText: Where do they stay?
questions.explanation: We stay inside.

passage.title: A Rainy Day
passage.text:
Today the sky is grey. It is rainy and windy. We stay inside.

I play with my teddy and my doll. My brother flies his kite when it is sunny.

Look at those clouds! But now we do a puzzle. It is fun.

Tomorrow will be sunny. We can play outside!

questions.questionText: What is the weather like today?
questions.explanation: It is rainy and windy.

questions.questionText: What do they do inside?
questions.explanation: But now we do a puzzle.

questions.questionText: What will tomorrow be like?
questions.explanation: Tomorrow will be sunny.

passage.title: A Rainy Day
passage.text:

I play with my teddy and my doll. My brother flies his kite when it is sunny.

questions.questionText: What is the weather like today?
questions.explanation: It is rainy and windy.

questions.questionText: What do they do inside?
questions.explanation: But now we do a puzzle.

lessons.title: Lesson 2: Toy Shop Visit
lessons.learningObjective: Read for toy names and shopping details in a short text.

passage.title: Toy Shop Visit
passage.text:
Lin goes to a toy shop with her mother. She sees a red robot and a blue balloon.

"Can I have the teddy?" asks Lin. Her mother says yes.

They buy a small puzzle too. Lin is very happy with her new toys.

questions.questionText: What colour is the robot?
questions.explanation: She sees a red robot.

questions.questionText: What does Lin ask for?
questions.explanation: Can I have the teddy?

passage.title: Toy Shop Visit

"Can I have the teddy?" asks Lin. Her mother says yes.

They buy a small puzzle too. Lin is very happy with her new toys.

questions.questionText: What colour is the balloon?
questions.explanation: A blue balloon.

questions.questionText: Who goes to the shop with Lin?
questions.explanation: Lin goes with her mother.

passage.title: Toy Shop Visit

"Can I have the teddy?" asks Lin. Her mother says yes.

They buy a small puzzle too. Lin is very happy with her new toys.

questions.questionText: Does Lin's mother say yes to the teddy?
questions.explanation: Her mother says yes.

questions.questionText: This text is mainly about _____.
questions.explanation: Bài về mua đồ chơi.

passage.title: Toy Shop Visit

"Can I have the teddy?" asks Lin. Her mother says yes.

They buy a small puzzle too. Lin is very happy with her new toys.

questions.questionText: Does Lin's mother say yes to the teddy?
questions.explanation: Her mother says yes.

lessons.title: Lesson 3: Park in the Sun
lessons.learningObjective: Understand sunny weather and outdoor toys in a park text.

passage.title: Park in the Sun
passage.text:
It is sunny today! We go to the park with our toys.

Tom has a ball and a kite. Anna brings her doll.

The wind is strong — the kite flies high! These clouds are white.

We play until four o'clock. What a lovely day!

questions.questionText: What is the weather like?
questions.explanation: It is sunny today!

questions.questionText: What does Tom have?
questions.explanation: Tom has a ball and a kite.

passage.title: Park in the Sun
passage.text:
It is sunny today! We go to the park with our toys.

Tom has a ball and a kite. Anna brings her doll.

The wind is strong — the kite flies high! These clouds are white.

We play until four o'clock. What a lovely day!

questions.questionText: What does Anna bring?
questions.explanation: Anna brings her doll.

questions.questionText: What time do they play until?
questions.explanation: We play until four o'clock.

passage.title: Park in the Sun
passage.text:
It is sunny today! We go to the park with our toys.

Tom has a ball and a kite. Anna brings her doll.

The wind is strong — the kite flies high! These clouds are white.

We play until four o'clock. What a lovely day!

questions.questionText: Why does the kite fly high?
questions.explanation: The wind is strong — the kite flies high!
Điền từ trong bài đọc.

content.template: It is [0] today. The [1] flies high!

passage.title: Park in the Sun

Tom has a ball and a kite. Anna brings her doll.

lessons.title: Lesson 4: Weather and Toys
lessons.learningObjective: Listen to descriptions and identify weather and toy words.

exercises.title: Learn: Listen: What's the Weather?
exercises.instructions: Listen to the conversation. Choose the correct answer.

script.title: Toys and Weather
script.setting: A bedroom looking out the window

lines.speaker: Mum
lines.text: Look outside, Alex. What's the weather like?

lines.speaker: Alex
lines.text: It's rainy. I can see a big cloud.

lines.speaker: Mum
lines.text: OK. Play inside. What's your favourite toy?

lines.speaker: Alex
lines.text: My robot! And I have two teddies.

lines.speaker: Mum
lines.text: When it's sunny, you can fly your kite.

script.audioNotes: Clear, slow delivery with pauses between exchanges. Total duration approx. 35 seconds.

questions.questionText: What is the weather like?
questions.explanation: Alex says: It's rainy.

questions.questionText: What is Alex's favourite toy?
questions.explanation: Alex says: My robot!

choices.distractorNote: He loves it but robot is favourite

questions.questionText: What can Alex fly when it is sunny?
questions.explanation: Mum says: When it's sunny, you can fly your kite.

lines.speaker: Mother
lines.text: No. It is rainy and windy.

lines.speaker: Mother
lines.text: Stay inside. Play with your toys.

questions.questionText: Is it sunny today?
questions.explanation: Mother: No. It is rainy and windy.

questions.questionText: What does Mother say to do?
questions.explanation: Stay inside. Play with your toys.

lines.speaker: Mother
lines.text: No. It is rainy and windy.

lines.speaker: Mother
lines.text: Stay inside. Play with your toys.

questions.questionText: What is the weather like?
questions.explanation: It is rainy and windy.

questions.questionText: Who says Look at the clouds?
questions.explanation: Lin: Look at the clouds!

questions.questionText: Match what you heard.
questions.explanation: Ghép câu hỏi và câu trả lời về thời tiết.

lines.speaker: Mother
lines.text: No. It is rainy and windy.

lines.speaker: Mother
lines.text: Stay inside. Play with your toys.

questions.questionText: What is the weather like?
questions.explanation: It is rainy and windy.

questions.questionText: Who says Look at the clouds?
questions.explanation: Lin: Look at the clouds!

lessons.title: Lesson 5: Write About Toys and Weather
lessons.learningObjective: Write short phrases to describe toys and weather using It's and plurals.

questions.questionText: Best sentence about weather:
questions.explanation: It is + tính từ thời tiết.

questions.questionText: Best sentence about toys:
questions.explanation: I have + a + đồ chơi.
Khung câu cho thời tiết và đồ chơi.

content.template: It is [0]. I play with my [1].

followUpQuestions: What do you play with inside?

questions.questionText: Record your answers to the follow-up questions.
questions.explanation: Chấm tổng thể theo tiêu chí. Trả lời ngắn vẫn được điểm một phần nếu dùng đúng từ vựng.

questions.questionText: Teacher asks about weather. Best reply:
questions.explanation: Câu đầy đủ: It's windy.

exercises.title: Review: Say Weather and Stay Inside

content.prompt: Say what the weather is like and what you do when it rains.
content.sceneDescription: Rain on the window; children with a puzzle indoors.
followUpQuestions: What do you play with inside?

questions.questionText: Record your answers to the follow-up questions.
questions.explanation: Chấm tổng thể theo tiêu chí. Trả lời ngắn vẫn được điểm một phần nếu dùng đúng từ vựng.

lessons.title: Lesson 3: Talk About Toys
lessons.learningObjective: Name toys and use these/those when speaking.

questions.questionText: You hold a teddy. You say:
questions.explanation: This is + số ít gần.

questions.questionText: Toys on the table near you. You say:
questions.explanation: These — gần, số nhiều.

content.prompt: Name two toys you like and say if it is sunny or rainy.
content.sceneDescription: Sunny park with kite, ball and doll.
suggestedAnswers: I like my kite and doll.

questions.questionText: Record your answers to the follow-up questions.
questions.explanation: Chấm tổng thể theo tiêu chí. Trả lời ngắn vẫn được điểm một phần nếu dùng đúng từ vựng.

questions.questionText: Kites far in the sky. You say:
questions.explanation: Those — xa, số nhiều.

content.prompt: Name two toys you like and say if it is sunny or rainy.
content.sceneDescription: Sunny park with kite, ball and doll.
suggestedAnswers: I like my kite and doll.

questions.questionText: Record your answers to the follow-up questions.
questions.explanation: Chấm tổng thể theo tiêu chí. Trả lời ngắn vẫn được điểm một phần nếu dùng đúng từ vựng.
